Lyrics.text:
Fitiavana re!
(Fitiavana, fitiavana ahy re)
Tsy takatra tokoa (tokoa)
Avo, lalina e!
(He! Avo lalina, ô, lalim-be)
Tsy manam-paharoa! (tsy roa)
Nefa inoako izao
Fa efa nasehonao,
(Efa nasehonao)
O! ry Ray teny Kalvary
Raha maty Kristy!

Fitiavana re!
(Fitiavana , fitiavana ahy re)
Manintona ny fo (ny fo)
Mba hanaiky e!
(Eny, mba hanaiky, hanaiky re)
Ho babony tokoa (tokoa)
Indro apetrako izao
Foiko re ho Anao
(Anao re hatrizao)
O! ry Ray mba hanompo etỳ
Ka ho hatrarỳ.

Fitiavana re!
(Fitiavana , fitiavana ahy re)
Izao tontolo izao (izao)
Voasarony e!
(He voasarony e, voasarony e)
Indrindra koa ianao (ianao);
O!ry namako, ekeo
Renao anio ’lay feo
(Renao anio ’lay feo)
Maty anie, tany kalvary
Ho anao Kristy.
